name: php-mysql
title: php-mysql
description:
MySQL module for PHP [default]
This package provides a MySQL module for PHP.
.
PHP (recursive acronym for PHP: Hypertext Preprocessor) is a widely-used
open source general-purpose scripting language that is especially suited
for web development and can be embedded into HTML.
.
This package is a dependency package, which depends on Debian's default
PHP version (currently 8.4).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use php-mysql because MySQL module for PHP [default].
When the engagement is in the install phase, use php-mysql as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair php-mysql with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `php-mysql --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
